falsification_conditions.condition: The price rises by 15% or more within the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained upward move would contradict the blowoff pattern and suggest continued bullish momentum, invalidating the 'HOLD' signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume falls below 30% of the 50-day average during the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Declining volume would indicate lack of participation in a potential blowoff, refuting the pattern's validity.

falsification_conditions.condition: The price closes above the 200-day moving average for 5 consecutive days within the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Breaking above this key trendline would signal a shift to bullish sentiment, directly opposing the blowoff scenario.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
